---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the ServiceNow → EDA solution
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to do that the solution doesn't support today?

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it touches a specific area, note which:

- [ ] `roles/snow_catalog_config` (ServiceNow side)
- [ ] `roles/eda_snow_config` (EDA side)
- [ ] `rulebooks/servicenow_catalog.yml`
- [ ] `configure_aap/` (config-as-code)
- [ ] Docs / README

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Additional context

Links to ServiceNow / AAP / collection docs, related issues, etc.
